game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ダンジョンスクワッド (Dungeon Squad):** Dungeon Squad is a roguelike tower defense game where players control a squad of up to 5 monster units to defend against waves of invading heroes across multiple stages. Players strategically tap to deploy monsters into designated slots and activate their unique skills, which have cooldowns ranging from 5 to 30 seconds, to defeat hero units advancing from the right side of the screen. After each wave, players choose one of three random upgrades, such as a new monster, a skill upgrade, or a temporary equipment piece, to enhance their squad's combat effectiveness. Defeated heroes drop "Soul Shards," a meta-currency used between runs to permanently unlock new monster types from a pool of 10 elite monsters and over 100 unique skills, and to upgrade the "Demon World" for global stat bonuses like +5% monster attack or +10% health. A run concludes upon the defeat of all player monsters, with the objective being to clear as many stages as possible and conquer hero bases to progress through the overarching campaign map.
game_info.description: Welcome to Dungeon Squad! Command a squad of monsters to defend against waves of invading heroes. Deploy up to 5 monsters in slots, activate their unique skills with cooldowns, and survive as many waves as possible. After each wave, choose from 3 random upgrades to strengthen your squad. Heroes drop Soul Shards when defeated - your meta-currency for permanent progression. Clear stages, defeat hero bases, and build the ultimate monster defense!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and upgrade choices
Space: Deploy selected monster to available slot / Activate monster skill
Z: Cycle through deployed monsters to select
Shift: Quick-select next available slot
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test. Validates core game mechanics including monster deployment, skill usage, hero spawning, and combat interactions. Tests that the game loop runs without errors and entities interact correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Deploy monsters randomly into available slots. Use skills when available. Allow combat to proceed naturally without optimal strategy. Focus on exercising all game systems rather than winning.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game runs without crashes. Monsters deploy successfully, skills activate, heroes spawn and move, combat occurs, and health changes are tracked. Test is successful if all core mechanics function for at least 3 waves or until game over.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements an optimal strategy to clear multiple waves and reach a win state. Tests upgrade selection, strategic monster placement, and efficient skill usage to maximize survival.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Deploy strongest available monsters in optimal positions. Prioritize high-damage monsters in front slots. Use skills strategically when heroes cluster or strong enemies appear. Select damage and health upgrades consistently. Focus fire on advancing heroes.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully clear 5+ waves by defeating all heroes before they breach defenses. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test succeeds when the squad defeats enough waves to trigger victory condition without losing all monsters.
